title: Heidi Griffith
compiled_truth: Heidi Griffith is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-14 to 2001-11-12), Heidi Griffith sent 17 and received 39 emails, totalling 56 interactions. Top correspondents: [Chris Germany](people/chris-germany) (17), [Wade Price](people/wade-price) (14), [Mary Franklin](people/mary-franklin) (14), [Gloria Barkowsky](people/gloria-barkowsky) (11), [Lashanda Poledore](people/lashanda-poledore) (10).
